query:
SELECT bve.id, bve.doctor_user_id, u.username as doctor_name, bve.pricing_status,
       bve.doctor_price_applied, bve.system_price_applied
FROM billing_visit_events bve
JOIN users u ON u.id = bve.doctor_user_id
WHERE bve.unit_id = 180001
  AND bve.pricing_status != 'ok'
ORDER BY bve.id DESC;
